title: [codereview] KISS: handle_sethardware resp_frame[128] too small for worst-case response
description: hw_cmd_cb response up to 64 bytes + escapes = up to ~132 bytes framed. resp_frame[128] can cause -ENOMEM (now correctly detected by incremental check) or was previously UB. Increase to 140 or use sizeof(ctx->tx_frame). Also affects test helpers. P2 correctness. Tagged codereview. Depends on project-LICHEN-8ysr and project-LICHEN-6zgj.
